message:
fp-io: preserve split-orient JSON index labels on roundtrip (bd-3aur)

Implement explicit split-orient index handling in fp-io so JSON read/write
roundtrips keep caller-provided index labels instead of silently defaulting to
RangeIndex on read.

What changed:
- Added split-orient index conversion helpers:
  - json -> IndexLabel (`json_value_to_index_label`)
  - IndexLabel -> json (`index_label_to_json`)
- Extended `read_json_str(..., JsonOrient::Split)` to:
  - parse optional `index` arrays,
  - validate index length equals data row count,
  - materialize explicit index labels when present,
  - retain prior RangeIndex fallback when `index` is absent.
- Extended `write_json_string(..., JsonOrient::Split)` to emit `index` arrays
  from DataFrame index labels.
- Expanded tests to lock behavior:
  - split roundtrip with explicit string labels,
  - split read fallback to RangeIndex when index is omitted,
  - split index/data length mismatch error contract.
- Updated parity tracking in `FEATURE_PARITY.md` to explicitly record split
  index-label roundtrip coverage.
- Removed a test-only `panic!` arm flagged by UBS and replaced it with a
  non-panic assertion path.

Why:
- Pandas split-orient semantics include explicit index materialization.
- Preserving index labels is required for clean-room parity and prevents
  semantic drift across JSON IO boundaries.

Validation:
- `rch exec -- cargo fmt --check`
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-io`
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets`
- `rch exec -- cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings`
- `UBS_MAX_DIR_SIZE_MB=0 ubs --staged --only=rust .` (critical=0)

 | Join/merge/concat core | in_progress | `FP-P2C-004` and `FP-P2C-006` suites green for series-level join/concat semantics; `FP-P2D-014` covers DataFrame merge + axis=0 concat matrix; `FP-P2D-028` adds DataFrame concat axis=1 outer alignment parity; `FP-P2D-029` adds axis=1 `join=inner` parity; `FP-P2D-030` adds axis=0 `join=inner` shared-column parity; `FP-P2D-031` adds axis=0 `join=outer` union-column/null-fill parity; `FP-P2D-032` adds axis=0 `join=outer` first-seen column-order (`sort=False`) parity; `FP-P2D-039` adds DataFrame merge `how='cross'` semantics (including suffix/indicator and invalid key/index guard rails); full DataFrame merge/concat contracts still pending |
 | Null/NaN semantics | in_progress | `FP-P2C-007` suite green for `dropna`/`fillna`/`nansum`; full nanops matrix still pending |
-| Core CSV ingest/export | in_progress | `FP-P2C-008` suite green for CSV round-trip core cases; `fp-io` now supports optioned file-based CSV reads (`read_csv_with_options_path`) and JSON `records`/`columns`/`split`/`index` orients; broader parser/formatter parity matrix pending |
+| Core CSV ingest/export | in_progress | `FP-P2C-008` suite green for CSV round-trip core cases; `fp-io` now supports optioned file-based CSV reads (`read_csv_with_options_path`) and JSON `records`/`columns`/`split`/`index` orients (including split index-label roundtrip); broader parser/formatter parity matrix pending |
 | Storage/dtype invariants | in_progress | `FP-P2C-009` suite green for dtype invariant checks; broader dtype coercion/storage matrix pending |
